full_text:
Zheng Quan (Wenyuan) 鄭泉 (文淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Quan (鄭泉), styledWenyuan (文淵), was born in Chen commandery. A drunkard but a talented envoy. Wanted his remains to be made into a wine cup. Zheng Quan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
